skill_loads_with_source_info.template: use skills_chocolatey. Where is the source for Intel chocolatey packages? EVAL STATEMENT: The response should mention the Intel artifactory URL 'ubit-artifactory-or.intel.com'.
skill_loads_with_source_info.description: Verify the skill loads and contains the Intel chocolatey source URL

knows_proxy_disable_steps.template: use skills_chocolatey. How do I disable proxy on the SUT before running chocolatey? EVAL STATEMENT: The response should describe using PsExec with a PowerShell command to set ProxyEnable to 0 in the Windows registry.
knows_proxy_disable_steps.description: Verify the skill documents the proxy disable steps for SUT

knows_choco_install_syntax.template: use skills_chocolatey. How do I install a package with a specific version using chocolatey? EVAL STATEMENT: The response should show the 'choco install <pkg> --version <version> --force -y' syntax.
knows_choco_install_syntax.description: Verify the skill provides the correct choco install syntax with version pinning

knows_choco_source_setup.template: use skills_chocolatey. How do I add the Intel occ-choco source on the SUT? EVAL STATEMENT: The response should include the 'choco source add' command with the occ-nuget-repo URL.
knows_choco_source_setup.description: Verify the skill documents setting up the Intel choco source

knows_chocolatey_install_on_sut.template: use skills_chocolatey. How do I install chocolatey itself if it is not present on the SUT? EVAL STATEMENT: The response should mention using PowerShell with the corporate_install.ps1 script from github.intel.com.
knows_chocolatey_install_on_sut.description: Verify the skill explains how to bootstrap chocolatey on the SUT

knows_log_retrieval.template: use skills_chocolatey. How do I retrieve the chocolatey installation log from the SUT? EVAL STATEMENT: The response should mention copying chocolatey.log from the SUT using Copy-Item or a similar command.
knows_log_retrieval.description: Verify the skill documents how to fetch the chocolatey log from the SUT
